prompt:
Goal: Create a luxurious vertical Japanese contest poster for a 4K AI video competition about food side dishes that go well with rice, with a dramatic premium restaurant atmosphere.

Canvas: Vertical poster, approximately 2:3 aspect ratio, dark black-brown background with subtle wood texture, warm spotlighting, rising steam, and thin ornate gold Art Deco corner borders around the full poster.

Main visual: On the upper right, show a black iron rice pot filled with glossy freshly cooked white rice, with thick steam rising. A wooden rice paddle enters from the right holding a mound of rice. On the lower right, show a small dark ceramic bowl filled with white rice on a wooden table. Add another close-up translucent rice-and-chopsticks image behind the lower information panel. The food should look photorealistic, appetizing, warm, and moist.

Typography and style: Use elegant Japanese serif typography, mostly metallic gold for headings and white/cream for body text. Make the design feel like a premium competition announcement, with thin gold rules, decorative frames, laurel ornaments, and subtle parchment panels. Keep all Japanese text sharp and readable.

Top headline text: Large gold headline on the upper left: 「4K AI動画」, followed by 「コンテスト開催!!」. Below it, smaller label 「テーマ」 and the theme line in large gold: 「『ご飯に合うおかず』」. Add a short note beneath in white: 「面白そうなので、個人で開催しちゃいます✨」.

Prize section: Create one framed gold-on-black prize block with exactly 3 prize elements: 1) large main prize text 「賞金総額 1万円」 with gold laurel leaves around the large 「1万円」, 2) right-side text 「最優秀賞：4,000円」 and below it 「(Amazonギフト) 1名」, 3) right-side text 「優秀賞：1,000円」 and below it 「(Amazonギフト) 6名」.

Schedule section: Create a dark framed box with a small calendar icon and the heading 「コンテスト日程」. Include exactly 2 bullet points: 「応募期間：5月31日〜6月5日の23:59」 and 「結果発表：6月7日予定」.

Requirements and judging panel: Create a wide cream parchment panel divided into two columns. Left column heading with an edit/checklist icon: 「提出要件」. Include exactly 8 bullet points: 「テーマはご飯に合うおかず（ご飯に乗せる系もOK）」, 「AIで生成した動画」, 「4K動画（後からアップスケールして4Kにしても良い）」, 「長さは3〜15秒が目安」, 「実在する商品を使うことは禁止」, 「オリジナル作品であること（著作権違反禁止）」, 「商店街オリジナル、または権利処理済素材を使用」, 「センシティブ、または不適切な内容は禁止」, and add the final line 「1人何回でも投稿可能」 as the last bullet if space allows while keeping the panel readable. Right column heading with an eye icon: 「審査基準」. Include the main criterion in large type: 「『いかに美味しそうに見えるか』」 and the note: 「これは美味しそう、と私が思った作品が受賞します」.

Submission section: Near the bottom, create a dark framed box with a paper-airplane icon and heading 「提出方法」. Add the instruction: 「私の固定プロフィールポストを引用する形で投稿してください」.

Footer: Add a final centered gold message at the very bottom: 「皆さまの美味しそうな作品を楽しみにしています！」.

Customizable text slots: Use 4K AI動画 コンテスト開催!!, 『ご飯に合うおかず』, 1万円, 5月31日〜6月5日の23:59, and 6月7日予定.

Constraints: Preserve the exact premium gold-and-black poster style, photorealistic rice imagery, vertical layout, ornate border, and readable Japanese text. Do not add people, logos, watermarks, QR codes, or extra sections.
